entries.message: 🌟 New Updates & News section on the home page! Now with two tabs — see platform changelog and the latest anime news from our Telegram channel
📰 Anime news feed powered by our Telegram channel — stay up to date with new seasons, announcements, and premieres!
📄 Platform changelog now shows what’s new in a user-friendly way — no more confusing developer commit hashes
📃 Browse anime with proper page navigation — numbered pages instead of endless Load More clicking
🔧 Fixed various styling and layout issues for a smoother experience
🛡️ Security improvements — stronger protection for your account and data
🎬 Unified subtitle selector for English players — easily pick your preferred subtitle track across HiAnime and Consumet
🔍 Search autocomplete in the navbar — find your favorite anime faster as you type!
⚡ Faster page loads — reduced lag and smoother transitions throughout the site
🎨 Genre filters in Browse and your watchlist — quickly narrow down by action, romance, comedy, and more
📚 Sort your watchlist by genre — organize your anime collection your way
✨ Polished header design, improved login widget, and better rating display
🔎 Search within your watchlist — instantly find any anime in your collection
🔧 Fixed theme ratings disappearing when your session refreshed
🎵 New Themes section — rate your favorite anime openings and endings!
🔑 API key authentication — integrate your watchlist with external tools
⚡ Gateway latency improvements — faster API responses across the board
📢 Activity feed on the home page — see what other users are watching and rating in real time
📊 Error reporting and monitoring — report playback issues directly from the video player
📝 Subtitle support for AnimeLib player — watch Russian-dubbed anime with subtitles when available
🇷🇺 AnimeLib player added — watch anime with Russian dubbing in high quality MP4!
🔧 Better subtitle sizing in fullscreen and improved video server switching
🇯🇵 Japanese subtitles with selectable text — click any word to study it! Works in fullscreen too
🎬 Video.js player with HLS.js fallback — choose your preferred player engine for the best experience
👤 Profile page upgrade — custom avatars, inline editing, viewing stats, and multi-language support
📚 MAL import improvements — bring your anime list from MyAnimeList even faster
🛡️ Improved security with rate limiting and CORS hardening
📱 Better mobile layout and navigation — smoother experience on phones and tablets
🔧 Fixed Kodik player — restored video playback after upstream API change
🔧 Improved HLS streaming reliability for English-subbed anime
🇯🇵 Consumet added as an alternative English anime provider — more sources, more reliability!
🌟 HiAnime player — watch English-subbed anime with HLS streaming and subtitle support
📊 Admin dashboard improvements — better monitoring and system health visibility
📤 MAL export service — export your watchlist data back to MyAnimeList
👥 Public profiles — share your anime watchlist with friends via a unique link!
🔍 Shikimori search button and last-updated dates for ongoing anime
✨ Beautiful custom dropdown selectors replacing browser defaults
📊 Performance monitoring added — we can now track and improve site speed
📚 MAL import — bring your entire anime list from MyAnimeList with one click!
🏠 Home page redesign with a beautiful 3-column layout
🌟 Watchlist and reviews system — track your progress and rate anime you've watched
✨ Skeleton loading animations — smoother experience while content loads
